meta.title: Sarmadax — We Build Digital Products That Scale
meta.description: Sarmadax is a digital agency specializing in SaaS development, custom web applications, mobile apps, UI/UX design, and AI integration.

hero.subtitle: From SaaS platforms to custom applications, we craft modern software solutions that drive growth and deliver exceptional user experiences.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: End-to-end digital solutions tailored to your business needs

saas.title: SaaS Product Development
saas.description: Full-cycle SaaS development from MVP to scale. We build multi-tenant platforms with modern architecture, subscription billing, and analytics dashboards.
saas.deliverables: MVP, Admin Dashboard, API, Billing Integration

webApp.title: Custom Web Applications
webApp.description: Bespoke web applications built with cutting-edge technologies. From complex dashboards to real-time collaboration tools, we bring your vision to life.

mobile.title: Mobile App Development
mobile.description: Cross-platform mobile applications that deliver native performance. Built with React Native for iOS and Android from a single codebase.
mobile.deliverables: iOS App, Android App, App Store Submission

design.title: UI/UX Design & Branding
design.description: User-centered design that converts. We create intuitive interfaces, design systems, and brand identities that make your product stand out.
design.deliverables: UI Design, UX Research, Design System, Brand Identity

ai.title: AI Integration & Automation
ai.description: Supercharge your product with AI. From chatbots and content generation to data analysis and process automation powered by latest AI models.
ai.deliverables: AI Chatbot, Automation Workflows, ML Pipeline

api.title: API Development & Integration
api.description: Robust REST and GraphQL APIs that power your ecosystem. We build scalable backends and integrate with third-party services seamlessly.

ecommerce.title: E-Commerce Solutions
ecommerce.description: Online stores that sell. Custom e-commerce platforms or Shopify solutions with payment processing, inventory management, and analytics.
ecommerce.deliverables: Online Store, Payment Gateway, Inventory System

maintenance.title: Maintenance & Support
maintenance.description: Keep your product running smoothly. Ongoing maintenance, performance monitoring, security updates, and feature enhancements on retainer.

designCode.title: Design + Code
designCode.description: We don't just build — we craft. Every project gets both exceptional design and clean, scalable code.

modernStack.title: Modern Stack
modernStack.description: Built with the latest technologies. React, Next.js, Node.js, AI — we use what works best for your project.

fastDelivery.title: Fast Delivery
fastDelivery.description: From concept to launch in weeks, not months. Our agile process keeps things moving without cutting corners.

ongoingSupport.title: Ongoing Support
ongoingSupport.description: We don't disappear after launch. Continuous support, updates, and improvements to keep your product ahead.

process.title: Our Process
process.subtitle: How we bring your ideas to life

discovery.title: Discovery
discovery.description: We dive deep into your business, users, and goals to define the perfect solution.

develop.description: Building with clean, scalable code using modern technologies and best practices.

about.title: About Sarmadax
about.subtitle: The story behind the code
about.story: Sarmadax was born from a simple belief: great software needs both exceptional design and solid engineering. Founded by a software engineer with a passion for design, we bridge the gap between beautiful interfaces and powerful backends.
about.mission: To help businesses transform their ideas into scalable digital products that make a real impact. We combine technical expertise with creative vision to deliver solutions that stand out.
about.founderBio: A full-stack software engineer and graphic designer with a passion for building products that look stunning and work flawlessly. Specializing in SaaS development, modern web applications, and AI integration.

quality.title: Quality First
quality.description: We never cut corners. Every line of code, every pixel, every interaction is crafted with care.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: Open communication throughout the project. You always know where things stand.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We stay ahead of the curve, using the latest technologies and methodologies.

partnership.title: Partnership
partnership.description: We're not just a vendor — we're your technology partner invested in your success.

1.name: Sarah Johnson
1.text: Sarmadax transformed our idea into a production-ready SaaS in just 8 weeks. The quality of both design and code exceeded our expectations. Our users love the interface.

2.name: Michael Chen
2.text: Working with Sarmadax was a game-changer. They built our complex data dashboard with real-time updates and handled every edge case. Truly professional team.

3.name: Emma Williams
3.text: The mobile app they built for us hit 50K downloads in the first month. The UI is stunning, performance is blazing fast, and they were communicative throughout.

4.name: Ahmed Al-Rashid
4.text: They handled full RTL Arabic support perfectly and delivered an e-commerce platform that now processes thousands of orders daily. Remarkable attention to detail.

contactExtra.readyDesc: Fill out the form and I'll get back to you within 24 hours with a tailored proposal for your project.
contactExtra.messagePlaceholder: Tell me about your project, goals, and timeline…

pricingPage.subtitle: Fixed-price packages. Know exactly what you get and what you pay — before a single line of code is written.

launch.name: Launch
launch.tagline: Full web app or SaaS MVP

pricingPage.addOnsDesc: Stack onto any package to extend its scope
pricingPage.step1Desc: 30-min discovery session. Tell me about your project, goals, and timeline. No commitment, no pitch.
pricingPage.step2Desc: Custom scope document and fixed-price quote delivered within 24 hours of our call.
pricingPage.step3Desc: 50% upfront, 50% when you approve the final product. Not happy? We keep working until you are.
pricingPage.g1Desc: Full source code, assets, and IP transfer on completion. Zero lock-in, ever.
pricingPage.g2Desc: We don't call it done until you're genuinely happy with every detail. Included.
pricingPage.g3Desc: The quote is final. No scope creep invoices, no surprise charges. Ever.
pricingPage.g4Desc: We set a delivery date and honor it. If we miss it, the delay is on us.
pricingPage.faq1q: What if I need changes after launch?
pricingPage.faq1a: Every package includes post-launch support — 2 weeks for Spark, 1 month for Launch. Anything beyond that is billed at an agreed hourly rate, which we set upfront.
pricingPage.faq2q: How does the 50/50 payment split work?
pricingPage.faq2a: 50% is due before we start — this covers design and early development. The remaining 50% is only due when you have approved the final product. You hold all the leverage.
pricingPage.faq3q: Do I get the source code?
pricingPage.faq3a: Yes — 100%. On final payment, all code, assets, and repository access transfer to you. You own everything, forever, no strings attached.
pricingPage.faq4q: My project doesn't fit these packages.
pricingPage.faq4a: The Scale package is fully custom, and we can build a bespoke quote for any scope. Just book a free call and we will figure it out together.
pricingPage.faq5q: How fast can you actually start?
pricingPage.faq5a: Within 1–3 business days of the first payment. We keep a limited number of spots open each month to ensure every project gets the full focus it deserves.
pricingPage.faq6q: Can you work with an existing codebase?
pricingPage.faq6a: Absolutely. We can extend your current codebase or build from your existing design files. We will scope it together on the discovery call.
pricingPage.ctaTitle: Ready to build something people love?
pricingPage.ctaDesc: Book a free 30-minute discovery call. No pitch, no pressure — just an honest conversation about your project and how to make it real.
